zh.Merton Manor, Great Torrington, Devonshi: 英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓
zh.Great Torrington, Devon, England: 英國戴文格亞特 托林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margery Merton於1330年出生在英國戴文默頓時，她的父親Sir Richard I de Merton51歲，母親Margaret de Clevedon41歲。她於1339年與William Le Moyne of Powderich II在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年在英國維爾爾馬丁頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margery Merton于1330年出生在英国戴文默頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard I de Merton51岁，母亲Margaret de Clevedon41岁。她于1339年与William Le Moyne of Powderich II在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1380年在英国維爾爾馬丁頓享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Merton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Merton, such as found in Surrey, Kent, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with both Marton and Murton .

variants.name: Marton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Antal, Arpad, Geza, Andras, Bela, Denes, Endre, Gaza, Imre, Istvan, Janos.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called, principally in Lincolnshire, Warwickshire, and North Yorkshire, named in Old English as ‘settlement by a lake’ (from mere or mær ‘pool, lake’ + tūn ‘settlement’) or as ‘settlement by a boundary’ (from (ge)mære ‘boundary’ + tūn ‘settlement’). Compare Martin 2.
Hungarian (Márton): from the personal name Márton (see Martin 1). This surname is also found in Romania; see also 3 below.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margery Merton was born in 1330, in Merton, Devon, England, her father, Sir Richard I de Merton, was 51 and her mother, Margaret de Clevedon, was 41. She married William Le Moyne of Powderich II in 1339, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1380, in Maddington, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margery Merton est née en 1330, à Merton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard I de Merton, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clevedon, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé William Le Moyne of Powderich II en 1339, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Maddington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margery Merton 1330 in Merton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard I de Merton 51 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Clevedon 41. Sie hat 1339 in Devon, England, United Kingdom William Le Moyne of Powderich II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Maddington, Wiltshire, England.

Lei sposato William Le Moyne of Powderich II nel 1339, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1380, nel Maddington, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Mertonが1330年にイギリスデボンマートンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard I de Mertonは51歳，母Margaret de Clevedonは41歳であった。1339年にイギリスイギリスデボンでWilliam Le Moyne of Powderich IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマッドイントンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Merton(이)가 1330년 영국 데폰 머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard I de Merton(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clevedon(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 William Le Moyne of Powderich II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 윌츠히르 매딩턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Merton nasceu em 1330, em Merton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard I de Merton, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clevedon, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com William Le Moyne of Powderich II em 1339, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Maddington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margery Merton родилась в 1330 г. в местности миртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard I de Merton было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clevedon, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Le Moyne of Powderich II в 1339 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности мэддингтон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con William Le Moyne of Powderich II en 1339, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
